messages.content:
API Error: 503 当前所有上游不可用：
  opencode-go-4 — 不可用（Monthly usage limit reached. Resets in 12 days. To continue ）

操作：编辑 upstreams.json 增删上游，或等冷却结束后自动恢复. This is a server-side issue, usually temporary — try again in a moment. If it persists, check your inference gateway (127.0.0.1:4000).
